notes: Completes standardized spore-print and field-identification fields for a first high-priority batch of common edible and dangerous gilled mushrooms.
Corrects aspen oyster spore print to whitish rather than lilac and corrects jack-o-lantern from deadly to poisonous gastrointestinal risk.
Keeps the Conocybe / Pholiotina group in review because its deadly-toxicity statement still needs a direct species-linked toxicology source.
